name: BLISS: Beyond the Edge of Time
original_name: 極樂：宇宙之前盡頭之後
overview: A poignant, unflinching look into the future, where the cold precision of technology collides with the fragile essence of humanity. Six distinct stories unfold — eachtracing a different path, yet converging on a singular question: in a future when memories can be erased, identities rewritten, and fate engineered, what remains trulyours? At the edge of civilization, love lingers in the void, freedom demands its price, and companionship becomes a quiet defiance against oblivion. Science fiction isnot merely a vision of what’s to come tomorrow, but a mirror reflecting who we are today.

trailers.title: BLISS: BEYOND THE EDGE OF TIME animated sci-fi anthology teaser #1
